desc: Build and manage your own 3D city in this urban planning simulation game.
Combine matching numbers to reach the elusive 2048 tile in this addictive puzzle game.
Step into the courtroom as a defense attorney to uncover the truth and prove your client's innocence.
Live a relaxing village life, make friends with animal neighbors, and customize your world.
Fight against an animated stick figure that's taken on a mind of its own.
Navigate through endless, eerie yellow rooms while avoiding mysterious entities.
Compete in fast-paced 1v1 or 5v5 basketball matches against players worldwide.
Grow your bee colony, collect pollen, and make honey in this buzzing adventure.
Live a virtual life where every choice you make shapes your character's destiny.
Arrange falling blocks to clear lines and achieve high scores in this classic puzzle game.
Pop waves of colorful balloons by strategically placing monkey towers in this classic tower defense game.
Defend against more challenging balloon waves with new towers and upgrades in this sequel.
Experience advanced tower defense with multiple paths, special agents, and powerful upgrades.
Roll a 2x1 block through tricky maze puzzles to reach the target hole.
Plan and execute the perfect bank heist while avoiding security measures.
Click to bake cookies, purchase upgrades, and build a massive cookie empire.
Follow recipes and use precise motions to cook delicious meals with Mama's guidance.
Cook even more recipes with new kitchen tools and cooking techniques.
Master international cuisine with expanded recipes and cooking challenges.
Mine resources and craft items in this block-building adventure game.
Help characters cross busy roads, train tracks, and rivers without getting hit.
Cut ropes strategically to feed candy to Om Nom, the adorable green monster.
Festive puzzles with holiday-themed obstacles to feed Om Nom seasonal treats.
Journey through history solving puzzles to deliver candy across different eras.
Embark on an epic RPG adventure where your choices determine the fate of the world.
Manage your character's lifestyle choices to become more popular and successful.
Build muscle, earn money, and improve your social status through workouts.
Draw paths to guide characters safely through challenging obstacle courses.
Train your duck in running, swimming, and flying to become racing champion.
Breed ducks with special abilities and train them for more challenging races.
Evolve your duck with advanced training techniques and compete worldwide.
Train your duck in new skills and battle against the evil Dark Swan.
Survive and conquer on the desert planet Arrakis, managing spice and resources.
Plan and execute clever escape routes to break out of maximum security prison.
Tap to keep the bird flying through narrow pipe gaps in this challenging arcade game.
Help Henry Stickmin execute daring escapes from a massive prison complex.
Survive your night shift by monitoring animatronic characters that come alive after dark.
Use the music box and flashlight to survive against new and old animatronic threats.
Survive nightmarish animatronics in your bedroom with only a flashlight for protection.
Customize your nightmare by choosing which animatronics will torment you.
RPG adventure featuring animatronic characters in colorful turn-based battles.
Win rap battles by matching rhythmic beats against challenging opponents.
Slice flying fruit with precision swipes while avoiding bombs in this arcade classic.
Guide a T-Rex running through the desert, jumping over cacti and avoiding obstacles.
Navigate hazardous obstacle courses with ragdoll physics and dark humor.
Rotate hexagonal blocks to clear lines in this fast-paced puzzle game.
Explore a vast, interconnected world of insects and heroes in this action-adventure.
Sneak aboard and take control of a massive airship in this heist adventure.
Endless platformer with procedurally generated levels in the style of classic Mario.
Play with a virtual buddy you can poke, punch, and customize with accessories.
Fly through a laboratory with your jetpack, avoiding zappers and collecting coins.
Help a penguin achieve flight by purchasing upgrades and mastering ramps.
Upgrade your penguin's equipment to fly farther and even reach space.
Perform incredible stunts in supercars across massive open-world maps.
Drive exotic cars through challenging stunt courses with realistic physics.
Build anything you can imagine in this free browser version of the classic sandbox game.
Putt your way through creative miniature golf courses with various obstacles.
Race through obstacle courses performing stunts on your dirt bike.
New levels, bikes, and challenges in this sequel to the popular bike racing game.
Navigate high school life and friendships at Monster High with your favorite characters.
Physics-based platformer where you swing, bounce, and launch through levels.
Evolve a pathogen to infect and eliminate the global population while evading cures.
Bake and decorate delicious pies for customers in this time-management game.
Cook burgers to perfection by grilling, assembling, and serving hungry customers.
Create mouthwatering grilled cheese sandwiches with various breads and cheeses.
Fry and decorate donuts with endless topping combinations for your customers.
Mix and serve delicious ice cream sundaes in this tropical frozen treat shop.
Flip pancakes and serve breakfast favorites in this diner management game.
Cook pasta dishes from scratch, making sauces and noodles for eager customers.
Run your own pizzeria, taking orders and creating perfect pizzas for customers.
Roll sushi and create beautiful platters in this Japanese cuisine management game.
Claim territory by drawing shapes while defending against rival players.
Fold and fly paper airplanes through challenging obstacle courses.
Explore the Hoenn region, catch Pokemon, and challenge the Elite Four in this classic RPG.
Journey through the Sinnoh region to become Pokemon Champion and face Team Galactic.
Relive the Kanto adventure, catch 151 Pokemon, and become the Pokemon League Champion.
Solve puzzles using portal guns in this flash adaptation of the beloved puzzle game.
Roll and bounce through levels as a brave red ball trying to save the world.
Navigate through challenging platformer levels with precise controls.
Manage and coach your football team to victory in this retro-style sports game.
Help Phil escape from school by solving puzzles and outsmarting teachers.
Continue Phil's escape attempts with new puzzles and characters to interact with.
More challenging puzzles await as Phil tries new ways to break free.
Phil's escape plans become more elaborate in this installment of the series.
The final chapter of Phil's escape saga with the most complex puzzles yet.
Phil's adventures continue beyond school with new locations to explore.
More point-and-click puzzles as Phil navigates through challenging situations.
Soccer with rocket-powered cars in fast-paced, explosive matches.
Guide a ball through an endless tunnel avoiding colored obstacles in this reflex game.
